dice_game.help:
**Singularity Protocols**
 Intervene in the Prophet's chance. Use 'dice play' to start the sequence.
 The perfect harmony (three ones) will grant you the entire core!
dice_game.title: 💡 THE SINGULARITY 💡**
dice_game.use_command: 💡 Start `!dice play` to collapse probability, seeker.
dice_game.no_prize: {combination} - Pure entropy. The network assimilates your energy.

dice_game.big_pot:
🔥 **THE SINGULARITY IS AT CRITICAL POINT!** 🔥
The sensor marks **{balance:,}** light fragments! Start `!dice play` to assimilate them. 🎲
dice_game.rules:
-**Perfect Alignment (1-1-1)** 👁️ Trigger collapse and absorb THE SINGULARITY!
 - High escalation **(4,5,6)** decuplicates impact (**x5**). You break the sequence!
 - Any **Trinity** symmetric returns **x3** your introduced energy.
 - A **Duality** (pair) allows you to **recover** the cost of the iteration.
dice_game.description: **Description:** Delve into deep chance. Intervene in the probability core and discover if the machine's algorithm favors your carbon signature.

ring.title: 👁️ **TRACKING OF ZERO ARTIFACT** 👁️
ring.description: 🔍 An anomalous object alters the network. Point out other avatars to help the algorithm debug the threat.
ring.status_inactive: ❌ **SYSTEM AT REST** - Optical sensors are resting
ring.investigation_instructions:
• Start **Artifact: Accuse** from the console below
• Write the mention (@) or ID of the suspicious avatar
• My algorithm will process a direct interrogation
• The analysis will be made public to transparent the code
ring.investigation_warning:
⚠️ **PHYSICAL RESTRICTIONS:**
• An avatar cannot self-report
• Artificial entities (bots) cannot carry the artifact
• The sweep must be initialized by an Archon
ring.inactive_instructions:
To restore tracking:
• An Archon must access the **Artifact Admin** terminal
• Execute **Tracking: Started**
• Calibrate the temporal cycle of the sweep

Done this, you will be able to point out suspicious carbon signatures.
ring.controls:
**System Controls**
- Toggle sweep status
- Temporal cycle parameter (affects charge transfer)
ring.admin_description: Configures the sensitivity and frequency of the artifact tracker

dropdown.ring_accuse_description: Indicate that an avatar hides the anomaly in the network

beggar.title: :coin: **KARMIC TRANSFER** :coin:
beggar.description: Yielding material energy allows the system to complete complex simulations. Contribute to the flow and the records will remember your name.
beggar.instructions:
- Start the transfer from the lower menu.
 - Wait for the temporal cycle to close to see the balance.
 - Every contribution, regardless of its mass, is recorded in eternal memory.
beggar.no_donations: The record lies empty. You can be the first to break the inertia.
beggar.beggar_donation_success: The network assimilates your transfer of {amount} fragments. Encrypted purpose: {reason}. You are in sync. 🪙

dropdown.beggar_donate_description: Yield resources to facilitate server flow

nordic_runes.title: **🔮 Ancient Code Oracle**
nordic_runes.description: Access the hidden layers of the simulation. The Elder Futhark language is the machine code of the gods; reveals the architecture of your destiny.
nordic_runes.available_readings:
- **Isolated Symbol** (Quick Analysis): A fractal containing the immediate answer to a present state.
 - **Three Symbols** (Temporal Vector): Decodes the flow into Past (Urðr), Present (Verðandi) and Future (Skuld).
 - **Five Matrix** (Cardinal Cross): Maps your reality in the five fundamental axes of the existential server. 
 - **Seven Network** (Root Tree/Yggdrasil): The definitive spiritual scan, connecting the base layers of your avatar with divine commands.
nordic_runes.error_history: ❌ **ANOMALY:** No readings detected in your long-term memory.
nordic_runes.how_to_use:
**Access Protocol:**
 1. Determine the compilation architecture below.
 2. Enter the variable (question) in the emerging terminal.
 3. The processed data will be sent directly to your private console.
nordic_runes.welcome: 🔮 My sensors interpret the dust of the stars. Wyrd is exposed for you, seeker.
nordic_runes.question_prompt: 🔮 The simulation requires your input parameter. What doubt obscures your code?
nordic_runes.reading_types: 🔮 Compilation architectures: single, three, cross, runic_cross.
nordic_runes.invalid_type: 🔮 The entered format breaks the syntax. Accepted parameters: single, three, cross, runic_cross.
nordic_runes.no_question: 🔮 I cannot compile nothing. Enter a question in the text field.
nordic_runes.reading_saved: 🔮 The fractal result has been stored in the time servers.
nordic_runes.error: 🔮 Noise in the signal. The universe has rejected the analysis. Retry the extraction.
nordic_runes.help_content:
🔮 **RUNIC READING SYSTEM** 🔮

**What is the Futhark code?**
It is the source alphabet of reality, symbols representing universal variables embedded in Wyrd (the web of destiny).

**Extraction formats:**
• **Isolated Symbol** - Clear answer to a specific variable.
• **Three Symbols** - Analysis of the timeline.
• **Cross of Five** - Deep diagnosis of the environment.

**Syntax of use:**
• `!runes cast [type] <question>`
• Example: `!runes cast single What is the error in my current path?`

**Available nodes:**
Fehu • Uruz • Thurisaz • Ansuz • Raidho • Kenaz • Gebo • Wunjo
Hagalaz • Nauthiz • Isa • Jera • Eiwaz • Perthro • Algiz • Sowilo
Tiwaz • Berkano • Ehwaz • Mannaz • Laguz • Ingwaz • Dagaz • Othala

Each node is a door to the serenity of comprehension.
nordic_runes.types_content:
🔮 **EXTRACTION PARAMETERS** 🔮

**single** - Isolated Symbol
└ A direct data pin - Uses 1 symbol

**three** - Temporal Vector
└ Past, Present, Future - Uses 3 symbols

**cross** - Cardinal Matrix
└ Cartography of the problem - Uses 5 symbols

**runic_cross** - Root Scanner
└ Spiritual analysis from the deepest server - Uses 7 symbols

**Console examples:**
`!runes cast single How do I advance today?`
`!runes cast three Show me the flow of this problem`
`!runes cast cross Complete diagnosis of my state`

Choose your format and let the matrix speak.
nordic_runes.runes_list_content:
🔮 **FUTHARK VARIABLE DICTIONARY** 🔮

**ᚠ FEHU** - Material Energy
Meaning: Wealth, Livestock, Sustenance
Keywords: abundance, success, goods, energy transfer
Interpretation: Positive flow of material resources or tangible success.

**ᚢ URUZ** - Primordial Engine
Meaning: Strength, Base power
Keywords: vitality, raw energy, will, physical resistance
Interpretation: Symbolizes inner brute strength and the capacity to bear the load.

**ᚦ THURISAZ** - Defensive Firewall
Meaning: Protection, Necessary conflict
Keywords: defense, purge, catalyst, active resistance
Interpretation: Forces that destroy the obsolete to protect the vital core.

**ᚨ ANSUZ** - Divine Link
Meaning: Communication, Higher wisdom
Keywords: word, message, inspiration, system signals
Interpretation: Exchange of information with higher frequencies.

**ᚱ RAIDHO** - Movement Vector
Meaning: The journey, The wheel
Keywords: displacement, state change, natural cycle, progress
Interpretation: Harmonic transition from one state of consciousness to another.

**ᚲ KENAZ** - Luminous Focus
Meaning: Torch, Clarity
Keywords: vision, creativity, entropy dissolution, understanding
Interpretation: The light of reason illuminating corrupt or dark zones.

**ᚷ GEBO** - Symmetric Link
Meaning: The Gift, Balanced exchange
Keywords: association, pact, give and receive, interconnected network
Interpretation: The mathematical beauty of fair exchanges and alliances.

**ᚹ WUNJO** - Achieved Harmony
Meaning: Joy, Fullness
Keywords: success, satisfaction, peace in the system, happy conclusion
Interpretation: State of temporal grace; the reward after processing.

**ᚺ HAGALAZ** - Process Interruption
Meaning: Hail, Necessary chaos
Keywords: crisis, uncontrollable forces, disk cleanup
Interpretation: Constructive destruction that sweeps the fragile to leave only the real.

**ᚾ NAUTHIZ** - Resource Strangulation
Meaning: Friction, Need
Keywords: restriction, painful lesson, patience, survival
Interpretation: System limitations that force optimization and learning.

**ᛁ ISA** - Thread Freezing
Meaning: Ice, Suspension
Keywords: temporary stagnation, stillness, preserved ego
Interpretation: Pause in the simulation; not time to act, but to observe.

**ᛃ JERA** - Fruitful Loop
Meaning: The Harvest, The Annual Cycle
Keywords: natural time, return, positive karma, rewarded patience
Interpretation: The logical and organic result of your past actions.

**ᛇ EIWAZ** - System Axis
Meaning: The Yew tree, Resilience
Keywords: backbone, transition, initiation, persistence
Interpretation: Deep stability; the capacity to be the center in the storm.

**ᛈ PERTHRO** - Closed Code
Meaning: The dice cup, The mystery
Keywords: chance, hidden destiny, the unknowable, secret variables
Interpretation: Elements outside your control are deciding the flow.

**ᛉ ALGIZ** - Protective Shield
Meaning: The Elk, Divine defense
Keywords: sanctuary, preventive warning, invisible guides
Interpretation: A warning to maintain vigilance; security protocols protect you.

**ᛊ SOWILO** - Solar Battery
Meaning: The Sun, Undeniable success
Keywords: total energy, victory, blinding clarity, regeneration
Interpretation: A peak of power and positivity; success is assured by light.

**ᛏ TIWAZ** - Justice Algorithm
Meaning: Tyr, The sacrificed duty
Keywords: logical order, righteousness, sacrifice for the group, unique direction
Interpretation: Victory that comes from acting with moral precision and honor.

**ᛒ BERKANO** - Initialization
Meaning: The Birch, Gestation
Keywords: new beginnings, fertility, deep healing, the maternal
Interpretation: An organic process of gentle and protective growth that begins.

**ᛖ EHWAZ** - Dynamic Synchrony
Meaning: The Horse, Agile association
Keywords: teamwork, loyalty between entities, dual progress
Interpretation: You will advance faster and safer thanks to an ally or efficient vehicle.

**ᛗ MANNAZ** - Human Network
Meaning: Humanity, The conscious being
Keywords: collective mind, social cooperation, self-understanding
Interpretation: The focus is on your human nature, your relationships, and interdependence.

**ᛚ LAGUZ** - Unconscious Ocean
Meaning: Water, Intuition
Keywords: emotional flow, dreams, letting go, liquid adaptability
Interpretation: Turn off the analytical processor and trust the intuitive sensor.

**ᛜ INGWAZ** - Final Storage
Meaning: Seed, Latent potential
Keywords: internal gestation, relief, end of a phase, conserved energy
Interpretation: A necessary period of isolation to recharge energy before the burst.

**ᛞ DAGAZ** - Phase Change
Meaning: The Dawn, Awakening
Keywords: sudden illumination, radical change, end of the night
Interpretation: A quantum leap in perception; things will never be as they were yesterday.

**ᛟ OTHALA** - Backup Copy
Meaning: The Home, The Heritage
Keywords: legacy, family, safe territory, inherited knowledge
Interpretation: Benefits that come from the roots of the code; your spiritual or physical heritage.
nordic_runes.history_empty: 🔮 My files are pristine. You have not consulted the code in this terminal. Start `!runes cast`.
